attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM )  /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */   AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT ,
  DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
  CAST(WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
  ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS SK_PH_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
  DRVD.PD_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       ,
  DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIBUTION_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
  DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
  DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  DRVD.CREATED_BY_INT                ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
  DRVD.EXTRACT_TYPE_CODE             ,
  'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
  DRVD.GL_DATETIME            ,       
  DRVD.GL_DATE                 ,      
  DRVD.GL_POSTED_DATE           ,     
  'I' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE_CODE,
  DRVD.LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT           ,
  'Y' AS LAST_RECORD_FLAG,
  DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CODE     ,           
  WI.QUOTA_FLAG,  
  DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMOUNT   ,
  DRVD.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLAG       ,
  DRVD.RULE_START_DATETIME           ,
  WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_NUMBER                 ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE              ,
  DRVD.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE_TRX_AMT    ,
  DRVD.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE_TRX_AMT   ,
  WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM AS PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER       ,
  DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_CODE ,
  DRVD.PD_AR_ADJ_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    ,
  DRVD.PD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   ,
  DRVD.PD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
  DRVD.DV_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
  WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
  DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
  DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
  CAST(WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DATE ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG   ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG          ,
  CASE WHEN (WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  IS NULL  OR WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = -999)  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG,
  CASE WHEN (WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM = '-999' OR WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL OR WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM = 'UNKNOWN') THEN 'Y'ELSE 'N' END DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_IC_REVENUE_FLAG       ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG          ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG             ,
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG          ,
  CASE WHEN DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY=-999
     THEN (
       CASE WHEN  ( NCA1.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
           OR NCA1.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE<>'I'
             )  
           AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
           AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
           AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG='Y' 
           AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG='N' 
          
     AND DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG ='N'
           AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG='N' 
           AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG='N' 
         
     AND DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ='N'
         THEN 'Y' 
        ELSE 'N' 
       END
      )
    ELSE 
    ( CASE WHEN  (NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE IS NULL
         OR NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE<>'I')
         AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
         AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG='N' 
         AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG='Y' 
         AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG='N' 
        
      AND DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG ='N'
         AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG='N' 
         AND DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG='N' 
        
      AND DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG ='N'
       THEN 'Y' 
      ELSE 'N' 
     END 
    ) 
  END DV_BKGS_CORP_BKG_FLAG,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)
   ELSE DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT  * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1) / COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100)) 
  END  AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) =0 THEN DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)
   ELSE DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT  * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT  * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1) / COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100))   
  END AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT,
  
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100) =0 THEN  DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)
   ELSE DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT  * (  WI.SPLIT_PCT  * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1) / COALESCE(DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,100))  
  END AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
  
  DRVD.DV_BKGS_EXTENDED_QUANTITY     ,
  WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM AS BK_SCAA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM AS BK_SCAN_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
  WI.SPLIT_PCT  * COALESCE(AI.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT,1)  AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE, /** AI Bkgs **/
  DRVD.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
  DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
  WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
  CAST(BPDC.PROCESS_DATE AS DATE) AS PROCESS_DATE ,
  DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY    ,                
  DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
  DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY     ,              
  DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,             
  DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
  DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
  WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE  ,
  USER,
  USER,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  DRVD.CONVERSION_RT   ,              
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
  'N' AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
  WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD AS SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
  DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
  'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE,
  DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT, 
  DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT, 
  DRVD.DV_TRX_QTY,
  -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
  DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/,
  DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
  DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
  DRVD.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
  DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
  DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
  DRVD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
  DRVD.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD            ,
	 COALESCE(AI.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,CASE WHEN NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES') THEN 'Y'  ELSE 'N' END, 'N') AS TRANSACTION_AI_FLG, /*Added as part of AI Bkgs*/
     COALESCE(AI.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,CASE WHEN NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM IN ('AI_DEDICATED','AI_CAPABLE_INTENT_YES')
THEN NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_VAL_NM ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END, 'UNKNOWN') AS AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
     COALESCE(AI.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME,NP.AI_PRODUCT_STRAT_CLASS_NM, 'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_TX_XAAS_NONAPLD_SC_I WI
   ON  DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
   AND DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WI.BK_SS_CD
 
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NARTRX
   ON (DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY = NARTRX.AR_TRX_KEY) 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL   
   ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NARTRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)  
  INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA1  
   ON (NCA1.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)  
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA 
   ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NARTRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)
  INNER JOIN (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ) BPDC 
   ON 1=1
  LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.AR_BKG_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_F AI /** AI Bkgs mvp4 **/
  ON DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = AI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND COALESCE(DRVD.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') =COALESCE(AI.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP ON DRVD.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,   DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY , WI.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, DRVD.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
 ORDER BY WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1

SELECT 
   DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT , 
   DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS BK_SS_CD , 
   DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , 
   DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
   DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG AS OLD_DEFAULT_SC_FLG, 
   WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,
   WI.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD,
   WI.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,
   WI.BK_SALES_REP_NUM,              
   WI.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD,    
   WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,   
   WI.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,  
   WI.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   WI.SPLIT_PCT,
   WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM,
   WI.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
   WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,             
   WI.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
   WI.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   WI.QUOTA_FLAG,
   WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WI.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
   WI.ACTION_CD,
   WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
   WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
   WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
   WI.EVENT_TYPE                       
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_SCA_NRT_XAAS_TV WI
   ON WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   AND WI.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <> 'O'
  WHERE 
    DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD <>'O'
    AND (DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE = 'FORWARD'   OR DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE = 'F')       
    AND DRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLAG IN ('Y')  
    AND DRVD.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY=-999

SELECT
 ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
 DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
 CAST(WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
 ROW_NUMBER()   OVER( ORDER BY WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM ) /* + SM_MAX.MAX_TRX_SEQ_ID */ AS SK_PH_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
 DRVD.PD_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       ,
 DRVD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            ,
 DRVD.GL_DISTRIBUTION_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE          ,
 DRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
 DRVD.CREATED_BY_INT                ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 DRVD.EXTRACT_TYPE_CODE             ,
 'R' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
 DRVD.GL_DATETIME            ,       
 DRVD.GL_DATE                 ,      
 DRVD.GL_POSTED_DATE           ,     
 'I' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE_CODE,
 DRVD.LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT           ,
 'N' AS LAST_RECORD_FLAG,
 DRVD.LINE_TYPE_CODE           ,     
 DRVD.QUOTA_FLAG,
 DRVD.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMOUNT   ,
 DRVD.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLAG       ,
 DRVD.RULE_START_DATETIME           ,
 WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
 DRVD.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY          ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_DATETIME               ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_NUMBER                 ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE              ,
 DRVD.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE_TRX_AMT    ,
 DRVD.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE_TRX_AMT   ,
 DRVD.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY        ,
 DRVD.PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER           ,
 DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER       ,
 DRVD.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_CODE ,
 DRVD.PD_AR_ADJ_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    ,
 DRVD.PD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   ,
 DRVD.PD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE      ,
 DRVD.DV_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE       ,
 WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT AS DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
 WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
 DRVD.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE        ,
 DRVD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 CAST(WI.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM AS DATE) AS DV_FISCAL_DATE ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG   ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG        ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG          ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG          ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG         ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_IC_REVENUE_FLAG       ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG          ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG             ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG          ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_CORP_BKG_FLAG         ,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT   * -1 AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT   * -1 AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT      * -1 AS DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 DRVD.DV_BKGS_EXTENDED_QUANTITY     ,
 DRVD.BK_SCAA_SALES_REP_NUMBER      ,
 DRVD.BK_SCAN_SALES_REP_NUMBER      ,
 DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE   * -1 AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
 DRVD.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE            ,
 DRVD.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
 WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 DRVD.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
 CAST(BPDC.PROCESS_DATE AS DATE) AS PROCESS_DATE ,
 DRVD.AR_TRX_KEY    ,                
 DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,               
 DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY     ,              
 DRVD.SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,             
  /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
  DRVD.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
 DRVD.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE        ,
 USER,
 USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 DRVD.CONVERSION_RT   ,              
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME           ,
 DRVD.DEFAULT_SC_FLG                ,
 DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
 DRVD.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
 DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
 DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT AS OLD_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
 'INSERT' AS EVENT_TYPE,
 DRVD.DV_TRX_AMT, 
 DRVD.DV_FUNC_AMT, 
 DRVD.DV_TRX_QTY,
 DRVD.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
 DRVD.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY /*added as a part of Q3FY16 SOT OA*/,
 DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
 DRVD.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
 DRVD.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          ,
 DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             ,
 DRVD.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      ,
 DRVD.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       ,
 DRVD.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD            ,
DRVD.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG,  /** Added as part of AI Bkgs **/
DRVD.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD,
DRVD.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVD
 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_BKG_TX_XAAS_NONAPLD_SC_I WI
  ON  DRVD.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT = WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT
  AND DRVD.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = WI.BK_SS_CD
  
 INNER JOIN (SELECT PROCESS_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL) BPDC
  ON 1=1
  
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      , DRVD.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,  DRVD.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  , DRVD.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT, DRVD.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
 ORDER BY WI.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT DESC)=1
